title: froelichia nudicaulis subsp. nudicaulis
intro: Froelichia nudicaulis subsp. nudicaulis, also known as sandpaper plant or desert orache, is a type of succulent plant that belongs to the Amaranthaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as acting as a natural diuretic. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties, but more research is needed to fully understand its effects on human health.
